description: Represents the ingress configuration of an application component.

defaultPolicyAccessDeniedMessage.description: The message that is sent if the access is denied by the default policy deny action.
defaultPolicyAccessDeniedMessage.title: defaultPolicyAccessDeniedMessage

defaultPolicyAction.description: The default action to take for connections ingressing to the proxy of this workload that do not match any of the policies.
defaultPolicyAction.title: defaultPolicyAction

failClose.description: If true, when any non-user-facing platform stage fails during request handling (extractor, mapper, analyzer, content policy, body read, etc.), the request is rejected. When false (default), the request is allowed through unanalyzed (fail-open), trading safety for availability. User-facing decisions (Unauthorized, Forbidden, Deny, Ask) are unaffected and continue to be enforced. Default false.
failClose.title: failClose

policies.description: The list of policies for ingress connections.
policies.title: policies

port.description: The listening port. For appcomponent configurations this is the listening port that traffic will be intercepted on or mirrored from.
port.title: port

proxyAccessPolicy.description: The computed rego access policy for the proxy.
proxyAccessPolicy.title: proxyAccessPolicy

proxyContentPolicy.description: The computed rego content policy for the proxy.
proxyContentPolicy.title: proxyContentPolicy

title: AppComponentIngress
